headline: Exploring the top movers within the S&P500 index during today's session.
summary: Stay informed about the performance of the S&P500 index in the middle of the day on Monday. Uncover the top gainers and losers in today's session for valuable insights.

headline: Market Greed Is Back: Oil and the Hormuz Strait Didn’t Get the Memo.
summary: The CBOE Volatility Index (CBOE:VIX) is up 2.2% today to hover just above 17, snapping back from Friday’s close as renewed Middle East tensions and crude price spikes reintroduce risk premium into options markets. The bounce comes one trading session after the S&P 500 set a fresh all-time high of 7,230, capping the index’s best ... Market Greed Is Back: Oil and the Hormuz Strait Didn’t Get the Memo.

headline: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Cboe Global Markets Following Q1 Earnings
summary: Cboe Global Markets (BATS: CBOE) reported strong Q1 earnings, beating market estimates and seeing significant revenue and EPS growth. Analysts raise price targets.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Cboe Global Markets, Raises Price Target to $382
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Budish   maintains Cboe Global Markets (BATS:CBOE) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $351 to $382.

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Cboe Global Markets, Raises Price Target to $335
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Chris Allen   maintains Cboe Global Markets (BATS:CBOE) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $300 to $335.
